notes: Chunk contains a single event: BLMN 10-Q accession 0001546417-24-000113 (Q1 2024 MD&A), part 1 of 2; names coined only from this visible part.
No fiscal_kpis in this chunk, so no KPI rewrites.
All 32 evidence quotes verified as verbatim substrings of the event content.

Skipped 11 considered items: adverse_weather (direction/magnitude adjectives, boilerplate), seasonality (bare category), consumer_tastes (vague), restaurant_competition (category boilerplate), goodwill_impairment (boilerplate only; actual-quarter impairments covered by asset_impairment_charges), sustainability_reporting_requirements (weak/boilerplate), litigation_risk (vague boilerplate), regulatory_compliance_costs (vague boilerplate), interest_rates (no causal narrative beyond boilerplate and rate table), debt_extinguishment_loss (same cause as convertible_notes_repurchase), total_revenue (too broad; decomposed into specific drivers).

Risk-factor cautionary list mined selectively for specific reusable causes only; brand-level comp tables (Carrabba's, Bonefish, Fleming's, Brazil) deduped under same_store_sales plus the highlighted outback_steakhouse_same_store_sales.
